title: Head Soccer 2023 2D
description: Have you ever played a soccer game before? this is different from all and in this adventure you have to score a goal with your head. Welcome to head ball or head football.The only goal in this game, which you can play both alone and with your friend, is to score a goal. score goals and win the match, all goals are in your hands. Come on, score a goal and win.
instructions: Single player mode Press arrow keys to move Press the Z and X key to hit the ball Two player mode Player 1 Press WASD to move Press the N and M key to hit the ball Player 2 Press arrow keys to mo
